metadata.source: BDEW — Bundesverband der Energie- und Wasserwirtschaft e.V.
metadata.description: Residential standard load profile for household electricity demand (Repräsentative VDEW-Lastprofile H0).
metadata.unit: normalised daily energy consumption (dimensionless; ratios used for monthly aggregation)
metadata.placeholder_note: PLACEHOLDER — daily energy averages are derived from the published BDEW H0 seasonal day-type structure. The full official profile provides 96 quarter-hourly power values for each of 9 combinations (3 seasons × 3 day types). Replace the daily_energy_by_season_daytype values with integrals of the official quarter-hourly H0 curves once licensed data is available.

daily_energy_by_season_daytype._note: Values represent relative daily household electricity demand by season and day type. Source: derived from BDEW H0 annual energy distribution. PLACEHOLDER — replace with official BDEW quarter-hourly integrals.

fallback_monthly_fractions._note: Pre-computed annual fractions (summing to 1.0) used when the day-type calculation cannot run. Derived from the BDEW H0 energy distribution for a representative German year. PLACEHOLDER.
